title: Wave of layoffs at Xbox causes union protests and intense debate about the company's future
summary: The massive layoffs at Xbox and Bethesda generate reactions across the industry, including defense of id Software, criticisms from veterans like John Carmack, and marches organized by unions.

title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced sells big but microtransactions spark wave of criticism
summary: The surprise launch of the Black Flag remake sells over two million copies on its first day, but players denounce microtransactions and Ubisoft defends the complete experience.

title: Robert Yang criticizes censorship on Steam and releases his queer game collection for free
summary: The developer denounces the lack of visibility his LGBTQ+ titles face on Valve's platform and publishes his complete works in a free compilation on Itch.io.

title: EU confirms it cannot force Sony to continue manufacturing physical PlayStation discs
summary: The Consumer Rights Commissioner responds to player requests, making it clear that Brussels has no authority to intervene in the company's physical format strategy.

title: Rockstar details new Kortz Center heist for GTA Online with release date and unique features
summary: The new GTA Online content features an assault on an art center with an innovative replayability system, while the community awaits news on GTA 6's multiplayer.

title: Writers from several specialized media outlets share what they're playing this weekend
summary: The editorial teams of Nintendo Life, Rock Paper Shotgun, and Eurogamer recommend and discuss the titles they are enjoying over the weekend.

title: Santa Monica Studio confirms physical release for God of War Laufey, pointing to 2027
summary: The next title in the God of War saga will have a disc version, reinforcing rumors that its release is planned for 2027.

title: Atlus releases new Persona 4 Revival trailer focused on Yosuke Hanamura
summary: The anticipated Persona 4 remake continues its marketing campaign with a trailer dedicated to one of its most charismatic characters.

title: Nintendo announces definitive closure of Mario Kart Tour for mobile devices
summary: The end of support for the mobile version of Mario Kart generates mixed reactions among fans and the industry, including criticism from official accounts of other franchises.

title: The resurgence of Steam Machine: in-depth performance analysis and new third-party accessories
summary: Valve's platform regains prominence after extensive playtests and the announcement of electronic ink cases made by external companies.

title: Launch of new Call of Duty Black Ops ports fragments the boycott of physical format and rekindles emblem controversy
summary: The arrival of Black Ops ports divides the community between those who wanted to boycott the digital format and those nostalgic for the emblem editor, including the appearance of offensive symbols.

title: Bethesda unions organize protest marches against massive Xbox layoffs
summary: Bethesda workers, backed by their unions, call for demonstrations to denounce the layoffs and demand accountability from Microsoft Gaming management.

title: Rockstar announces preload date and distribution details for GTA 6
summary: After years of anticipation, the first official details on the pre-order and digital preload process for Grand Theft Auto 6 are revealed.

title: Palworld modifies its most controversial designs ahead of version 1.0 launch
summary: Pocketpair's team adjusts the appearance of several creatures to smooth over similarities with other franchises and perfect the final experience.

title: Netflix threatens to acquire popular movie social network Letterboxd
summary: According to press reports, Netflix is reportedly planning to purchase Letterboxd, the movie review and discovery app.

title: First details revealed for Fire Emblem Fortune's Weave on Nintendo Switch 2
summary: The new title in the Fire Emblem series is shaping up to be one of the major strategic launches for Nintendo's next console.

title: Minecraft adds a long-awaited feature 17 years after its launch
summary: Mojang adds a mechanic to the game that users had been solving creatively for years, expanding the construction and exploration possibilities of the title.

title: Anime Expo 2026 confirms return of Cyberpunk Edgerunners and new Ghost in the Shell series
summary: The Los Angeles convention announces two of the most anticipated anime series, expanding the universes of CD Projekt Red and Masamune Shirow.

title: Square Enix finally allows disabling the annoying fairy in Adventures of Elliot after player complaints
summary: A game update adds the option to disable the most irritating character in the title, responding to constant community criticism.

title: New transformations in Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3 seem weakened, but not all is as it seems
summary: Fans speculate about a possible nerf to the new abilities, while the development team suggests there is more to discover.
